caption: The video captures a basketball player practicing his shooting skills in an indoor gymnasium. The player, dressed in a pink sleeveless shirt and black shorts, is seen running towards the basketball hoop with a ball in hand. As he approaches the basket, he leaps into the air, extending his arm to shoot the ball. The gym features a polished wooden floor with blue and yellow markings, and the walls are painted white with a blue lower section. The bleachers on the left side of the frame are empty, emphasizing the solitary practice session. The player's focused expression and athletic form highlight his dedication to improving his basketball skills.
